title: Agreement under the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea on the conservation and sustainable use of marine biological diversity of areas beyond national jurisdiction
official_citation: A/CONF.232/2023/4; UN Treaty Collection, Chapter XXI.10; C.N.203.2023.TREATIES-XXI.10 (adoption)
source_publisher: United Nations — BBNJ Agreement website (Office of Legal Affairs / DOALOS)
retrieved_by: Cowork (provenance-corpus-builder), automated fetch of the official UN PDF
rights_note: United Nations material. UN treaty texts are official documents that may be freely reproduced with attribution; no warranty. Authentic in the six UN languages. See https://www.un.org/en/about-us/terms-of-use and https://www.un.org/en/about-us/copyright.
capture_note: Automated fetch of the official UN English-language PDF via the sanctioned fetch tool; extraction capped at ~142k characters. Raw fetch stored byte-exact as original.txt.
provenance_note: PARTIAL CAPTURE — the upstream official artifact is a PDF (source_url); it was captured here via the sanctioned fetch tool, which returns a text extraction and was capped at ~142k characters. The stored authentic English text therefore covers the title, Preamble, and Articles 1–73 (Parts I–XII up to Art. 73). Articles 74–76 and Annexes I (indicative criteria for ABMTs) and II (types of capacity-building and transfer of marine technology) are NOT yet included — a recorded, not hidden, gap (see GAPS.md). Layout was normalised (see capture/clean_english.py: header/cover/page-number removal, line reflow, soft-hyphen repair) with wording unaltered, hence text_fidelity=extracted_unverified. Closing the gap and byte-for-byte PDF re-capture will be recorded as a dated corrections[] entry; the authentic text is authoritative in all six UN languages (five currently flagged as gaps).
